title: One Tear
content:
Last night, when at parting
         Awhile we did stand,
    Suddenly starting,
         There fell on my hand

    Something that burned it,
         Something that shone
    In the moon as I turned it,
         And then it was gone.

    One bright stray jewel--
         What made it stray?
    Was I cold or cruel,
         At the close of day?

    Oh, do not cry, lass!
         What is crying worth?
    There is no lass like my lass
         In the whole wide earth.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Fuller Murray delivers a powerful performance in "One Tear"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
